# Universal Object Contract Template

Use one shared vocabulary across the entire system.

## Core object types
- client
- user
- workspace
- prompt
- artifact
- document
- signal
- opportunity
- lead_candidate
- validated_lead
- contact_path
- import_ready_row
- blocked_item
- quarantined_item
- run_event
- scheduler_task
- recovery_event

## Per-object contract
### Object name
- description:
- unique key:
- required fields:
- optional fields:
- evidence fields:
- lifecycle states:
- write destinations:
- prohibited assumptions:

Repeat for each object.
